title: Advanced Item Stats
description: Adds an unobtrusive way to view important statistics about items in the inventory.
body:
# | DESCRIPTION | Pressing the ```shift``` key shows more detailed stats about items in the item icon, such as attack damage values or potion effects. This overlay will not affect the normal item without shift, and will not reveal details about another player's items or items on the ground. Modded items will not work properly.
Current features - Firework rocket flight duration value - Firework rocket explosion overlay (will only show whether it will explode, no details. Useful when using elytra to avoid using the wrong rocket.) - Ominous bottle effect strength overlay - Item dye crafting/smelting colors (all flowers and similar items, not including dye combination such as blue + red) - Sus sand/gravel - Bee Nest/Hive indicator for whether it contains a bee or not - More visible Bee Nest/Hive indicator for whether honey is harvestable or not - Infested blocks - Waxed copper blocks - Button active duration
Planned features - Item damage values - Armor protection values - Food hunger values + potion and special effects - Pressure plate duration - Glowing block light levels - Effects of potion ingredients in brewing - Painting sizes in creative mode - Important/exclusive enchantments such as breach vs. density, mending
# | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.21.5 - 26.1.2```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with any resource pack that modifies any files modified in ```assets/minecraft/items``` or any pack that uses the same custom filenames (more unlikely) May look strange when the vanilla texture of a modified item is changed, due to the overlay not using the changed texture. For this reason, it is incompatible with many cosmetic packs. ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
